final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account is identified by the model as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the applicant has substantial savings is identified by the model as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that the applicant has minimal savings is identified by the model as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.
final_explanation_ko:
모델의 예측에 따르면, 계좌 잔액 부족은 위험 감소 요인으로 식별됩니다. [1]
대출자가 상당한 저축을 보유하고 있음은 위험 감소 요인으로 분석됩니다. [2]
저축 잔액이 거의 없음에도 불구하고 위험 감소 요인으로 작용합니다. [3]
전반적으로 이 고객은 낮은 채무 불이행 위험을 가질 것으로 평가됩니다.

shap_features.definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
Savings account status: savings at least 1000 DM.
Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
